headline: WebSocket API
description: The WebSocket API is the browser-side interface to the WebSocket protocol (RFC 6455), providing full-duplex, bidirectional communication between browser and server over a single TCP connection.

citation.name: Real-Time Web Communication: WebSocket, WebRTC, and Server-Sent Events (2025 Edition)
citation.author: Grigorik I.

citation.name: A Survey of Real-Time Communication Protocols (2025)
citation.author: multiple
